name: Ruined Portal Overhaul
description:
Ruined Portal Overhaul transforms every overworld ruined portal encounter into a Massive Portal Dungeon: a radius-136 corrupted scar with calm Nether-like surface undulation, a protected pit hub, worm-carved corrupted caves, lava runs, an altar, atmospheric red storm effects, frequent loot chests, and deeper treasure.

Explorers who enter the approach zone feel the portal stir, receive a red-aether boon while inside the territory, and get one starter Totem of Undying per portal. Standing near the frame awakens a five-wave raid of Piglin Illager variants with crossbows, axes, ravagers, evocation magic, boss-bar progress, inter-wave warnings, ring-based spawns, server-side corruption atmosphere, red thunder, advancement progression, richer mob drops, and Hard-mode combat upgrades.

Completing the raid lights the generated frame into a functional Nether portal, disables the pre-raid spawners, spawns a boss reward chest, and summons the Exiled Piglin Trader for a short-lived gold-based reward shop. The system tracks completion per portal location so each dungeon becomes a one-time survival challenge rather than a repeatable farm.
